case_title: FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC VS. BERNARDO LUCERO et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-04-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUCERO, BERNARDO POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 2008 FORD ESCAPE, VIN 1FMCU59H48KE76125, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $515.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,515.00, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LUCERO, BERNARDO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-04-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-28-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-19-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC SERVED JUN-29-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUCERO, BERNARDO
DECLARATION KYLE MORRISON FILED RE: IN LIEU OF TESTIMONY IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT BY COURT (CCP 512.010) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $515.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LUCERO, BERNARDO
